---
title: "Glossary & Metrics"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
**Plain-language explanations of the terms, metrics, and acronyms** used
elsewhere in this publication. A non-specialist reader should be able to come
here, read one definition, and return to the main thread without losing the
plot. Delete the section if the project doesn't use specialised vocabulary.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - What terms, acronyms, or jargon does this project use that a generalist
    wouldn't know?
  - For each metric you report, what does it actually measure and what counts
    as a good or bad value?
  - Where do conventions differ (e.g. one definition in the literature, a
    slightly different one used here)? Note the choice.
-->
